# Alberta Personal Information Protection Act

Jurisdiction: Canada - Alberta
Region: CA-AB
Citation: Personal Information Protection Act
Authority: Alberta King's Printer / OIPC Alberta
Source URL: https://kings-printer.alberta.ca/1266.cfm?page=P06P5.cfm&leg_type=Acts&isbncln=9780779846590
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, security_breach, retention_deletion
Keywords: Alberta PIPA, privacy breach reporting, personal information

## Summary
Alberta private-sector privacy law with consent rules, access rights, safeguards, retention, and privacy breach reporting.

## Key compliance obligations
- Obtain consent or rely on statutory exceptions.
- Give access and correction rights.
- Report real-risk-of-significant-harm breaches.
